final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure marketing poster for OPPO Find X9 Ultra full-screen display.

Style/medium: high-impact commercial advertising poster, clean tech aesthetic with premium product photography
Composition: vertical 9:16 format (1080×1920), full-bleed product showcase, centered hero shot with generous negative space
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, edge-to-edge full-screen display, sleek modern design, premium finish
Scene/backdrop: minimal gradient or abstract tech-inspired background, no distracting elements, focus entirely on device
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with soft reflections, premium luxury feel, subtle rim light highlighting device edges
Color palette: OPPO brand colors (green/white) or premium dark tones with accent highlights, high contrast for visual punch
Text (verbatim): "OPPO Find X9 Ultra"
Constraints: must work as full-screen mobile wallpaper/ad format at 1080×1920; brand name must be prominent and legible
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermarks, low contrast, deformed product proportions
